message:
fix: deep code review — Worker compat, Zig SVG improvements, CI, and cleanup

- Fix Worker crash: default format "url" (no fs), force file-writing
  formats to "url" in ConfiguredDiagram, handle JSON-RPC notifications
- Fix Zig SVG: read strokeWidth from elements (was hardcoded 2),
  XML-escape fill/stroke colors, increase point limit 16→64
- Fix TS SVG fallback: read strokeWidth for rect/ellipse (was hardcoded)
- Guard process.stderr.write for Worker environments
- Increase WASM renderSvg buffer 256KB→512KB for large diagrams
- Add HTTP DELETE method support for MCP session cleanup
- Add CI workflow (pnpm 10, Node 22, Zig 0.15.2)
- Add LICENSE, .gitignore patterns, package.json files field
- Remove unused deps (@cloudflare/codemode, @modelcontextprotocol/ext-apps)
- Make sdk.ts/layout.ts Node.js imports dynamic for Worker compat
- Add wrangler.toml nodejs_compat + unsafe_eval flags
- Update CLAUDE.md to match current architecture
- Add Zig shared utils: copySliceJsonEscaped, extractIntField guards
- Zig validate.zig: handle whitespace in boundElements, escape IDs

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,33 @@
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+
+jobs:
+  test:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
+        with:
+          version: 10
+
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: 22
+          cache: pnpm
+
+      - uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v1
+        with:
+          version: 0.15.2
+
+      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
+      - run: pnpm build
+      - run: pnpm typecheck
+      - name: Zig tests
+        run: cd wasm && zig build test
+      - run: pnpm test

@@ -9,7 +9,8 @@
   "main": "./dist/index.js",
   "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
   "scripts": {
-    "build": "tsc && cp src/widget.html dist/widget.html",
+    "build": "{ cd wasm && zig build && cd ..; } || echo 'Zig not available, skipping WASM build'; tsc && cp src/widget.html dist/widget.html",
+    "build:wasm": "cd wasm && zig build",
     "dev": "tsx src/index.ts",
     "test": "vitest run",
     "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit"
